content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be reconfigured to rank and prune curiosity-driven exploration bonuses in ICM/RND frameworks, only retaining surprise signals that map to long-term memory schemas the agent has not yet consolidated. This creates a 'curiosity gatekeeper' that prevents the agent from wasting exploration on trivial, unlearnable novelty while prioritizing high-impact unknowns that build generalizable capability.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
